query:
SELECT ec.establishmentId, ec.categoryId, ec.isPrimary, c.name as categoryName 
FROM establishment_categories ec 
JOIN categories c ON c.id = ec.categoryId 
WHERE ec.establishmentId = 30002;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT ec.establishmentId, ec.categoryId, ec.isPrimary, c.name as categoryName 
FROM establishment_categories ec 
JOIN categories c ON c.id = ec.categoryId 
WHERE ec.establishmentId = 30002;
